name: packagecloud
vendor: Buildkite (formerly Packagecloud, Inc. / Computology; acquired Sept 2023, now "Buildkite Package Registries")
license: Proprietary (closed-source SaaS; the package_cloud CLI and packagecloud-ruby client libraries are open source under MIT)
cost: Free tier (2 GB storage / 10 GB transfer); Starter $89/mo (5 GB / 20 GB); Pro $150/mo (15 GB / 50 GB); Enterprise $699/mo (150 GB / 250 GB; SSO/SAML, SLA, SLSA audit, 24/7 support); Enterprise+ custom (threat scanning, federated repos, dependency mirroring, license checks, multi-region). Unlimited users/repos and CI/CD minutes on all tiers. Storage/bandwidth overages billed per GB.
language: Ruby (Rails platform; package_cloud CLI is a Ruby gem)
last_updated: 2026 (actively operated as Buildkite Package Registries; packagecloud.io still live)
repo: https://github.com/computology/packagecloud-ruby (open-source MIT client library; server is proprietary)
perf_notes: Downloads/installs served via AWS CloudFront CDN ("lightning speed"); HTTPS-only. Vendor cites 99.99% availability since inception (2014) and 600 TB+ annual data transfer across 119 countries. No published throughput/latency/memory benchmarks (managed SaaS).
scale_notes: Managed multi-tenant SaaS on AWS (S3 + CloudFront). Unlimited repos/users/packages on all plans; multi-region and federated repositories on Enterprise+. Used by large orgs (GitHub, GitLab, Netflix, OpenAI, Slack, DigitalOcean, CircleCI, Heroku). HA/scaling are vendor-operated and not user-tunable. Former self-hosted "packagecloud:enterprise" full-stack appliance is deprecated; replaced by a BYO-storage option.
summary: A multi-ecosystem hosted package registry (PyPI, npm, Debian/APT, RPM/YUM, RubyGems, Maven/Java, Alpine, Helm, Docker, generic files) for private and public repositories, now part of Buildkite as Buildkite Package Registries.
extras: Multi-ecosystem: PyPI, npm, Debian/APT, RPM/YUM, RubyGems, Maven/Java, Alpine, Docker, Helm, and generic files in one platform (multiple formats in one repo)

PyPI repos serve a PEP 503 simple HTML index at /<user>/<repo>/pypi/simple/ with per-file md5/sha1/sha224/sha256/sha384/sha512 checksums; HTML-only, no PEP 691 JSON index. Any installer (pip/uv/poetry/pdm/pipenv) resolves from it via Basic-Auth
Uploads via the package_cloud Ruby CLI, REST API (POST /api/v1/.../packages.json), or web UI -- not the PyPI legacy/twine upload endpoint
Master/read token hierarchy: master tokens mint scoped, per-repo read tokens used as the Basic-Auth username
Promote API moves packages between repositories (staging->production workflow)
Automatic SBOM generation on every upload
Per-repository GPG-signed metadata (apt/yum-style) with a unique key per repo
Stats API with detailed download/install analytics
HTTPS-only (no plaintext HTTP), IPv6, AWS CloudFront CDN delivery
SOC 2 attestation completed; CSA STAR / PCI DSS Level IV compliance cited
Deep CI integrations (CircleCI, Travis CI, Buildkite, GitHub Actions, Jenkins)
Enterprise+ adds federated (merged) repositories, dependency mirroring (pull-through cache of upstream), threat scanning, and license checks
Acquired by Buildkite in Sept 2023; rebranded Buildkite Package Registries; self-hosted appliance deprecated in favor of BYO storage
